description: Georgia provides partial state funding for AP Exams for eligible public-school students.
credential_or_recognition: AP course/exam participation; AP is not a high-school diploma
relationship_to_graduation: Optional advanced coursework; does not replace Georgia graduation requirements unless accepted by the school/district for applicable course credit.
school_authorization_notes: AP courses/exams depend on school authorization and availability; state funding policy does not prove every Georgia school offers every AP course.

description: Qualified Georgia students in grades 10-12 may earn high school and college credit simultaneously by passing approved college classes.
controlling_organization: Georgia Department of Education / Georgia Student Finance Commission / participating postsecondary institutions
credential_or_recognition: High-school and college credit for approved college coursework when successfully completed
relationship_to_graduation: Optional dual-credit pathway; eligible courses may apply toward high-school graduation requirements according to Georgia and local rules.
school_authorization_notes: Participation depends on eligibility, approved courses, participating institutions, and local high-school approval.

description: Regional vocational training pathways. Varies by region. Leads to professional qualifications.
28 revamped trade subjects for technical colleges. NABTEB-administered.

CONALEP provides upper-secondary professional technical-baccalaureate education, combining technical preparation for employment with baccalaureate education that permits continuation to higher education.
VET institutions under MoES. Can be entered after Grade 9 or 11. Part of national system.
SPO institutions (техникумы, колледжи, училища). Federal standards. Part of national system.
Technical secondary: Industrial, Agricultural, Commercial branches. Part of national system under MoETE.
BTEB vocational education. SSC Vocational, HSC Vocational/BMT, Diploma programs. Part of national system.
Victorian VCE Vocational Major. Applied pathway within VCE. VET-integrated.
